title: YTPMV: Demoman Headdy  (unfinished)
description:
The first Video I made using multiple Video Tracks. I know it's not rly a masterpiece ..   I remember back in the days I used to think YTPMV's are easy to make but  D:    ....  The song and footage in the background are from the game: Dynamite Headdy(Sega Mega Drive) 
Enjoy  :D

The next vid I upload will probably be Gmod related again :) 
cya
